profile.name: Phuong Le
profile.bio: Hi there! I am a Vietnamese international student documenting my daily rhythm of study, creative work, and content creation in Taiwan. I love sharing positive vibes, learning Mandarin, and preparing for my upcoming internship at a tech company in Taipei. Let's connect!

timeline.title: Morning Lectures
timeline.description: Attending University courses in Taipei, learning business strategy and discussing cases with global peers.

timeline.title: Work & Collaboration
timeline.description: Working on part-time content strategy projects or collaborating on internship preparation tasks.

timeline.title: Vlog Shooting & Editing
timeline.description: Capturing beautiful spots in Taipei, recording voiceovers, and editing short-form content for social media.

timeline.title: Exploring Taiwan
timeline.description: Grabbing street food at Shilin or Raohe Night Market, learning local culture, and networking with friends.

vlogs.title: A Day in my Life as a Vietnamese Student in Taipei
vlogs.description: Come along with me for a busy Tuesday! Attending class, grabing a refreshing bubble tea, studying at a gorgeous cafe, and exploring the Taipei 101 area.

vlogs.title: How I Landed My Upcoming Internship in a Taiwanese Firm
vlogs.description: My resume prep, interview experiences in Mandarin and English, and positive tips for international students looking for jobs in Taiwan.

vlogs.title: Quick Guide to Learning Mandarin Chinese in Taiwan
vlogs.description: Sharing my language learning journey, useful daily phrases, and how I practice speaking with local Taiwanese friends.
